title: Lighthouse Distribution Contract
description: Machine-readable distribution contract defining all release variants, their artifact identity, and update ownership. Published as a GitHub Release asset and consumed by CI, runtime/UI, and the website.

version.description: Schema version for this contract format.

variantId.description: Stable identifier for this distribution variant.

artifactNames.description: Canonical release asset filenames for this variant.

updateOwner.description: Which component owns the update/install lifecycle for this variant.
